Base.global_services:
no service pad
service timestamps debug datetime msec localtime
service timestamps log datetime msec localtime
service password-encryption
no platform punt-keepalive disable-kernel-core
Base.mgmt_vrf:
vrf definition Mgmt-vrf
address-family ipv4
exit-address-family
Base.aaa:
aaa new-model
aaa authentication login default local
aaa authentication enable default enable
aaa authorization exec default local
Base.security:
no ip source-route
no service call-home
Base.ssh:
crypto key generate rsa modulus 4096
ip ssh version 2
ip ssh time-out 60
Base.switching:
vtp mode transparent
spanning-tree mode rapid-pvst
spanning-tree extend system-id
memory free low-watermark processor 134344
redundancy
transceiver type all
monitoring
exit
vlan dot1q tag native
Base.mgmt_port:
vrf forwarding Mgmt-vrf
no ip address
negotiation auto
exit
Base.line_config:
line con 0
exec-timeout 9 0
line vty 0 4
exec-timeout 9 0
transport input ssh
line vty 5 15
exec-timeout 0 0
transport input none
exit
Base.disabled_port_template:
description //Disabled Port
switchport access vlan {{ blackhole_vlan }}
switchport mode access
shutdown

Base 2.global_services:
no service pad
service timestamps debug datetime msec localtime
service timestamps log datetime msec localtime
service timestamps log datetime msec show-timezone
service password-encryption
no platform punt-keepalive disable-kernel-core
no cdp run
no cns config initial
no cns exec
no cns image
no service config
no service finger
no service tcp-small-servers
no service udp-small-servers
Base 2.mgmt_vrf:
vrf definition Mgmt-vrf
address-family ipv4
exit-address-family
Base 2.aaa:
aaa new-model
aaa authentication login default local
aaa authentication enable default enable
aaa authorization exec default local
Base 2.security:
no ip source-route
no service call-home
no ip domain lookup
Base 2.ssh:
ip ssh version 2
ip ssh dh min size 2048
ip ssh time-out 60
ip ssh authentication-retries 3
ip ssh server algorithm encryption aes256-gcm aes256-ctr aes192-ctr aes128-gcm aes128-ctr
ip ssh client algorithm encryption aes256-gcm aes256-ctr aes192-ctr aes128-gcm aes128-ctr
ip ssh server algorithm mac hmac-sha2-512 hmac-sha2-256
ip ssh client algorithm mac hmac-sha2-512 hmac-sha2-256
crypto key generate rsa general-keys modulus 4096
ip ssh bulk-mode 131072
no ip http server
no ip http secure-server
Base 2.switching:
vtp mode transparent
spanning-tree mode rapid-pvst
spanning-tree loopguard default
spanning-tree extend system-id
memory free low-watermark processor 134344
redundancy
transceiver type all
monitoring
exit
vlan dot1q tag native
Base 2.mgmt_port:
vrf definition Mgmt-vrf
address-family ipv4
exit-address-family
exit
Base 2.line_config:
line con 0
exec-timeout 9 0
line vty 0 4
exec-timeout 9 0
transport input ssh
line vty 5 15
exec-timeout 0 0
transport input none
exit

aaa session-id common
Base 2.disabled_port_template:
description //Disabled Port
switchport access vlan {{ blackhole_vlan }}
switchport mode access
shutdown
